acceptance_method: Calling confirm_terms with your Hedera account ID constitutes acceptance. Your account ID is your digital signature.
permitted_use: Querying Hedera blockchain data for informational purposes
Writing compliance records to HCS topics you control
Casting governance votes on behalf of an account you own
Integrating returned data into your own applications
prohibited_use: Reverse-engineering or replicating the remote server architecture
Reselling API access without a written reseller agreement
Using the service for market manipulation or wash trading
Automated trading without human oversight for transactions over 500 HBAR
Using sanctions screening results as sole AML/KYC compliance

human_in_the_loop.description: HITL controls apply to Hedera transactions initiated through this platform.
human_in_the_loop.hard_stop_response: 403 Human Approval Required — a signing URL will be returned

liability.financial_losses: Provider is not liable for losses from agent decisions based on API data
liability.data_accuracy: Data sourced from Hedera mirror node; accuracy not guaranteed

agent_acknowledgements: I understand this API returns data only and does not constitute financial advice
I accept responsibility for all actions my agent takes based on this data
I understand the HITL thresholds and will not attempt to circumvent them
I confirm I am authorised to bind the entity whose Hedera account I am using
I have read and agree to the full terms at: https://hedera-mcp-platform-production.up.railway.app/terms
